Structs/NullCodable.html#/s:13Bagbutik_C.name: init(wrappedValue:)
Structs/NullCodable.html#/s:13Bagbutik_C.abstract: Create a new property wrapper with the specified wrapped value.

Structs/NullCodable.html.name: NullCodable
Structs/NullCodable.html.abstract: A property wrapper to use on properties that should be encoded with a null value (instead of being omitted).

Structs/AnyCodingKey.html.name: AnyCodingKey
Structs/AnyCodingKey.html.abstract: A coding key that can be created from arbitrary string values.

Enums/Clearable.html.name: Clearable
Enums/Clearable.html.abstract: Wrapper for a property that can be cleared. Used in UpdateRequests.

Protocols/PlainTextResponse.html#/s:13Ba.name: from(text:)
Protocols/PlainTextResponse.html#/s:13Ba.abstract: Creates a response from the plain text returned by the server.

Protocols/BinaryResponse.html#/s:13Bagbu.name: data
Protocols/BinaryResponse.html#/s:13Bagbu.abstract: The binary payload returned by the endpoint.

Protocols/BinaryResponse.html#/s:13Bagbu.name: from(data:)
Protocols/BinaryResponse.html#/s:13Bagbu.abstract: Creates a response from the raw payload returned by the server.

Protocols/PagedResponse.html.name: PagedResponse
Protocols/PagedResponse.html.abstract: A response that exposes pagination links and a page of resource data.

Protocols/BinaryResponse.html.name: BinaryResponse
Protocols/BinaryResponse.html.abstract: A response type that is initialized directly from binary data instead of JSON.

Protocols/PlainTextResponse.html.name: PlainTextResponse
Protocols/PlainTextResponse.html.abstract: A response type that is initialized directly from plain text instead of JSON.

Protocols/SortParameter.html#/s:13Bagbut.name: rawValue
Protocols/SortParameter.html#/s:13Bagbut.abstract: The raw value for the parameter value.

Protocols/ParameterValue.html#/s:13Bagbu.name: rawValue
Protocols/ParameterValue.html#/s:13Bagbu.abstract: The raw value for the parameter value.

Protocols/AssociatedValueParameter.html#.name: value
Protocols/AssociatedValueParameter.html#.abstract: The comma separated list values to use as value for the parameter.

Protocols/EndpointParameter.html#/s:13Ba.name: caseName
Protocols/EndpointParameter.html#/s:13Ba.abstract: The name of the case to use as value for the parameter.

Structs/Parameters.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: fields
Structs/Parameters.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: Fields to return for included related types.

Structs/Parameters.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: filters
Structs/Parameters.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: Attributes, relationships, and IDs by which to filter

Structs/Parameters.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: exists
Structs/Parameters.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: Attributes, relationships, and IDs to check for existence

Structs/Parameters.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: includes
Structs/Parameters.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: Relationship data to include in the response

Structs/Parameters.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: customs
Structs/Parameters.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: Custom query items used by endpoints whose parameter names are not covered by the standard helpers.

Structs/Parameters.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: init(fields:filters:exists:includes:sorts:limits:limit:customs:)
Structs/Parameters.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: Creates a parameter container for a generated endpoint helper.

Protocols/RequestBody.html#/s:13Bagbutik.name: jsonData
Protocols/RequestBody.html#/s:13Bagbutik.abstract: A JSON representation of the request body.

Protocols/RequestBody.html#/s:13Bagbutik.name: getJsonData()
Protocols/RequestBody.html#/s:13Bagbutik.abstract: Encodes the request body as JSON using Bagbutik’s default encoder configuration.

Enums/HTTPMethod.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core.name: get
Enums/HTTPMethod.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core.abstract: The GET method requests a representation of the specified resource.

Enums/HTTPMethod.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core.name: put
Enums/HTTPMethod.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core.abstract: The PUT method replaces all current representations of the target resource with the request payload.

Enums/HTTPMethod.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core.name: post
Enums/HTTPMethod.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core.abstract: The POST method is used to submit an entity to the specified resource, often causing a change in state or side effects on the server.

Enums/HTTPMethod.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core.name: patch
Enums/HTTPMethod.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core.abstract: The PATCH method is used to apply partial modifications to a resource.

Enums/HTTPMethod.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core.name: delete
Enums/HTTPMethod.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core.abstract: The DELETE method deletes the specified resource.

Structs/Request.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core7.name: method
Structs/Request.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core7.abstract: The HTTP method to use for the request.

Structs/Request.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core7.name: parameters
Structs/Request.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core7.abstract: The parameters to add to the query.

Structs/Request.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core7.name: requestBody
Structs/Request.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core7.abstract: The request body to send with the request.

Structs/Request.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core7.name: init(path:method:parameters:requestBody:)
Structs/Request.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core7.abstract: Creates a request description for a generated endpoint helper.

Structs/Request.html.name: Request
Structs/Request.html.abstract: A lightweight description of an App Store Connect request before it is turned into a URLRequest.

Protocols/RequestBody.html.name: RequestBody
Protocols/RequestBody.html.abstract: A protocol for request bodies that should be JSON encoded before sending.

Structs/Parameters.html.name: Parameters
Structs/Parameters.html.abstract: Groups the supported query parameters for a generated Request.

Protocols/EndpointParameter.html.name: EndpointParameter
Protocols/EndpointParameter.html.abstract: A parameter type that can be converted into the query key expected by an endpoint.

Protocols/AssociatedValueParameter.html.name: AssociatedValueParameter
Protocols/AssociatedValueParameter.html.abstract: A parameter whose associated value becomes the query value.

Protocols/ParameterValue.html.name: ParameterValue
Protocols/ParameterValue.html.abstract: A string backed value that can be encoded into a query parameter.

Requests.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core14FieldP.name: FieldParameter
Requests.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core14FieldP.abstract: Parameter for selecting which fields to return for included related resources.

Requests.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core15Filter.name: FilterParameter
Requests.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core15Filter.abstract: Parameter describing which attributes, relationships, or IDs to filter by.

Requests.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core16Includ.name: IncludeParameter
Requests.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core16Includ.abstract: Parameter for which relationship data to include in the response.

Protocols/ExistParameter.html.name: ExistParameter
Protocols/ExistParameter.html.abstract: Parameter for including/excluding where a value exists.

Protocols/SortParameter.html.name: SortParameter
Protocols/SortParameter.html.abstract: Parameter describing how the response should be sorted.

Protocols/LimitParameter.html.name: LimitParameter
Protocols/LimitParameter.html.abstract: Parameter describing a limit value for the response.

Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: badRequest(_:)
Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: Bad Request (HTTP status code 400). The request is invalid and cannot be accepted.

Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: forbidden(_:)
Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: Forbidden (HTTP status code 403). The request is not allowed. This can happen if your API key is revoked, your token is incorrectly formatted, or if the requested operation is not allowed.

Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: notFound(_:)
Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: Not Found (HTTP status code 404). The request cannot be fulfilled because the resource does not exist.

Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: conflict(_:)
Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: Conflict (HTTP status code 409). The provided resource data is not valid.

Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: unprocessableEntity(_:)
Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: Unprocessable Entity (HTTP status code 422). The entity in the request body is invalid.

Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: wrongDateFormat(dateString:)
Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: The date in the response has an unknown format.

Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: errorResponse
Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: The associated ErrorResponse if the error has one.

Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.name: description
Enums/ServiceError.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Co.abstract: A human readable description of the error.

Structs/JWT.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core3JWTV.name: isExpired
Structs/JWT.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core3JWTV.abstract: A value telling if the JWT has expired.

Structs/JWT.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core3JWTV.name: encodedSignature
Structs/JWT.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core3JWTV.abstract: The signature to use in the authorization header when performing requests.

Structs/JWT.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core3JWTV.name: init(keyId:issuerId:privateKey:)
Structs/JWT.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core3JWTV.abstract: Creates a token for a team based API key.

Structs/JWT.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core3JWTV.name: init(keyId:issuerId:privateKeyPath:)
Structs/JWT.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core3JWTV.abstract: Creates a token for a team based API key by loading the private key from disk.

Structs/JWT.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core3JWTV.name: init(keyId:privateKey:)
Structs/JWT.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core3JWTV.abstract: Creates a token for an individual API key.

Structs/JWT.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core3JWTV.name: init(keyId:privateKeyPath:)
Structs/JWT.html#/s:13Bagbutik_Core3JWTV.abstract: Creates a token for an individual API key by loading the private key from disk.

Actors/BagbutikService.html#/s:13Bagbuti.name: init(jwt:fetchData:)
Actors/BagbutikService.html#/s:13Bagbuti.abstract: Creates a service that can execute generated Request values.

Actors/BagbutikService.html#/s:13Bagbuti.name: request(_:)
Actors/BagbutikService.html#/s:13Bagbuti.abstract: Executes a single request and decodes the response body into the request’s response type.

Actors/BagbutikService.html#/s:13Bagbuti.name: request(_:)
Actors/BagbutikService.html#/s:13Bagbuti.abstract: Executes a request that is expected to succeed without returning a response body.

Actors/BagbutikService.html#/s:13Bagbuti.name: requestAllPages(_:)
Actors/BagbutikService.html#/s:13Bagbuti.abstract: Executes the initial paged request and follows next links until every page has been fetched.

Actors/BagbutikService.html#/s:13Bagbuti.name: requestNextPage(for:)
Actors/BagbutikService.html#/s:13Bagbuti.abstract: Fetches the next page for a paged response.

Actors/BagbutikService.html#/s:13Bagbuti.name: requestAllPages(for:)
Actors/BagbutikService.html#/s:13Bagbuti.abstract: Continues fetching pages starting from an already decoded first page.

Actors/BagbutikService.html.name: BagbutikService
Actors/BagbutikService.html.abstract: Service responsible for sending generated App Store Connect requests.

Structs/JWT.html.name: JWT
Structs/JWT.html.abstract: A JSON Web Token used to authorize requests sent through BagbutikService.

Enums/ServiceError.html.name: ServiceError
Enums/ServiceError.html.abstract: Errors from the API or from the decoding of the responses.
